chunks.title: Do Not Fret at the Wicked
chunks.reason: An initial exhortation to trust God and not envy evildoers, contrasting their temporary fate with the inheritance of the righteous.

chunks.title: The Fate of the Wicked and Righteous
chunks.reason: A descriptive argument detailing how the wicked scheme against the righteous but ultimately perish while the humble inherit the land.

chunks.title: Character and Conduct of the Righteous
chunks.reason: A section focusing on the practical behavior of the righteous, including generosity and trust, with promises of God's sustaining care.

chunks.title: Personal Witness and Final Assurance
chunks.reason: The psalmist offers personal testimony regarding the wicked's end and concludes with a final assurance of God's salvation for the righteous.
